title: Grab the Mic Game - Karaoke Party Game for Ages 8+ | Fun Family Games & Adult Party Games with 130 Cards | Hilarious Singing Challenge for Game Nights
features: THE ULTIMATE GRAB THE MIC GAME: Unleash instant fun with our fast-paced karaoke party game! Flip a card, spot the word, and be the first to sing a lyric. This thrilling singing game requires no talent, just quick thinking, creating unforgettable family games night excitement for all ages

HILARIOUS LYRIC CHALLENGE FOR PARTIES: Get ready for non-stop laughter! This microphone game pushes players to think on their feet, leading to sidesplitting, off-key performances. It delivers bigger laughs and more musical madness than any standard music game for adults and teens

DYNAMIC GAMEPLAY WITH ADVANCED MODES: Double the fun and replayability! The reversible game board introduces bonus challenges, while the Mute Token adds a strategic press your luck twist. This family party game evolves with each play, ensuring every game night remains fresh, competitive, and engaging

COMPLETE MUSIC PARTY GAME SET: Everything for instant entertainment is included! Your set contains 130 diverse lyric cards, a premium foam microphone, a game board, tokens, and rules. As a family games staple, this all-in-one party games bundle requires no setup—just open the box and play!

SUITABLE GIFT FOR GAME NIGHTS AND CELEBRATIONS: Designed as a family game for ages 8 and up, it is a go-to gift for birthdays and Christmas. This party game for adults and families bridges generations, creating epic musical memories and friendly competition at any gathering

FAST-PACED COMPETITIVE GAMEPLAY: Race against other players to grab the microphone and sing a lyric containing the revealed keyword. The first player to correctly sing wins the round, making every moment filled with excitement and friendly competition

NO SINGING TALENT REQUIRED: This karaoke game focuses on quick thinking and creativity rather than vocal ability. Players of all skill levels can enjoy the challenge, making it accessible and entertaining for everyone at your gathering

specifications_table.Included Components: 130 Lyric Cards, 1 Foam Microphone, 1 Game Board, Tokens, Rules
